name: io.github.jarmstrong158/cambium-remote
title: cambium (remote)
description: Self-hosted Cloudflare Worker for read-only recall of cambium team/org knowledge.

account.description: Your Cloudflare account subdomain (the 'x' in x.workers.dev); edit the URL if you use a custom domain.

token.description: Your Worker AUTH_TOKEN (set as a Worker secret at deploy time). It is the path credential; keep it private.
